message:
fix: Implement TODO stubs with real functionality

Async/Concurrency:
- async/poller.zig: Full cross-platform epoll/kqueue implementation
- async/future.zig: Error propagation via Poll.err variant
- async/runtime.zig: Worker thread pool with processorWorkerLoop
- async/machine.zig: Condition variable parking (park_mutex, park_cond)
- async/channel/select.zig: try-send/try-recv with bounded channel header
- green_thread_stub.zig: Cooperative scheduler with spawn/wait/yield
- netpoller.zig: Linux timerfd support for efficient timers

Stdlib Lib/:
- subprocess.zig: Non-blocking poll(), timeout with SIGKILL
- re.zig: IGNORECASE flag via (?i) pattern prefix
- shutil.zig: Archive creation (tar/gztar/bztar/xztar/zip)
- os.zig: Proper lstat syscall implementation
- html.zig: Full attribute parsing with quoted/unquoted values
- http/client.zig: Custom header support via h2_client.setHeader
- http/parser/headers.zig: SIMD header parsing with @Vector(16, u8)
- json_impl: PyFloat.create for floats (was truncating to int)
- unittest/case.zig: Full TestCase with 15+ assertion methods
- unittest/mock.zig: Deep list comparison in MockValue.eql

Python/ runtime:
- bltinmodule.zig: Modular exponentiation pow(), format spec parsing
- import.zig: Thread-safe mutex lock, frozen modules, relative imports
- context.zig: HAMT delete via DELETED_SENTINEL pattern
- pystate.zig: Per-thread dict, threadStateSetAsyncExc
- ast_executor.zig: PyFloat.create, PyBool.create for constants

Codegen:
- native_types/expressions.zig: Lambda type inference, parseTypeAnnotation
- symbol_table.zig: findMethodWithTypes, getMethodsWithTypes
- expressions/calls.zig: Keyword argument mapping via param_names
- for_basic.zig: Full genAsyncFor with __aiter__/__anext__

Bytecode:
- compiler.zig: Function/class compilation, comprehensions
- opcode.zig: Full serialization/deserialization
- vm.zig: CALL_FUNCTION dispatch, 9 builtins (len,int,float,etc)

Debug:
- dap_server.zig: Launch/attach config, step/continue/evaluate
